sub_problems: Does the LLM induction head's two-head 'copy-and-paste-by-pattern' algorithm have a direct circuit-level analog in an animal associative-learning system?

Can mechanistic-interpretability discoveries from LLMs be used as predictive hypotheses for neuroscience experiments?
